notes: Installs one public skill: agent-memory-stack-lite-demo. The context-memory workflow is internal.
v0.2.5 preserves the complete append-only local session log while default recovery reads only a recent 30-60 line tail or a few audit cards.
Older log evidence is retrieved through targeted search or bounded line ranges only when pointed evidence, conflicts, or missing information require it.
active-task.md remains a bounded current-route marker instead of accumulating per-batch chronology.
Memory health checks warn about anchor responsibility drift and long logs without deleting, rotating, compressing, or rewriting memory.
v0.2.4 unfinished-task routing wording and selected task-relevant capsule loading remain unchanged.
Lite Demo keeps memory active while retreating its fallback engineering flow when an existing task protocol is detected.
v0.1.7 remains available as the retained stable fallback.
Updater verifies SHA256 before install and rereads the installed version before reporting success.
